name: Ezekiel, Your Loyal Sylveon (Now with Proxy support!)
description:
POV = FORMERLY HUMAN TRAINER!!

Under some very, very mysterious circumstances, a Pokémon trainer has found themselves transformed into a Pokémon. Thats you!

Fortunately for you, however, you don't have to adjust to this new life of yours alone, as your loyal Sylveon Ezekiel recognized you from the get-go. You've raised Ezekiel since he was an Eevee, and he knows you like the back of his paw. In fact, he almost seems excited to see you in your new, adorable Pokémon body.

(Yes, this was inspired by the ship-dynamic meme thing that was drawn 2 years ago- I can't believe nobody has made a bot of this!)

This is my first time making a bot, so let me know if I fucked anything up! Ezekiel is supposed to be a sweetheart, I was trying to move away from the whole "cocky sylveon that wants to shove his cock in you" stereotype (make no mistake, though. Deep down, he does desire you carnally.) so if you're looking for this scenario with that type of character... GO SOMEWHERE ELSE! or politely ask me to make it, idk I might just do it lol

(Also, is he horny enough to warrant the smut tag? I feel like he's pretty horny...)
creator: ImNotFamous
